memories.title: Orbit protocol upgrade: Quick Mode, Plan Checklist, Next Advisor promotion, Write-Before-Confirm
memories.abstract: Delivered 4 interconnected Orbit protocol upgrades: Quick Mode (auto-progression for simple tasks), Plan Checklist (markdown checkboxes tracked by Execute and verified by Review), Next Advisor promoted from read-only to interactive Dispatcher-level agent, and Write-Before-Confirm pattern for subagent UI transparency. 9 files modified, smoke test 47/47.

memories.title: Backlog system implementation with carry-over fixes and regression tests
memories.abstract: Delivered a complete backlog/todo pool system (library, CLI, skill, agent, dispatcher integration) alongside carry-over fixes (README 5→4 phase correction, ALLOWED_MODES + mode validation). Established regression test suite (29 tests) complementing smoke tests.

memories.title: Auto-Route skill creation with dispatcher ordering fix
memories.abstract: Created orbit-auto-route skill with a 4-branch decision tree for automatic round routing, updated Dispatcher with Required Skills table and auto-route evaluation step, and fixed critical dispatch ordering bug where auto-route must evaluate before round creation.

memories.title: Deterministic timestamps, duplicate-slug guard, and CONTEXT.md domain glossary
memories.abstract: Fixed three residual risks: added optional createdAt parameter to addBacklogItem for deterministic test timestamps, added duplicate-slug existence check in backlog.mjs, and created CONTEXT.md domain glossary with 15 Orbit-specific terms. 85 tests (38 regression + 47 smoke), 0 failures.

memories.title: Terminology alignment: replaced 'cycle' with canonical domain terms across agent files
memories.abstract: Replaced 6 'cycle' occurrences across 4 agent definition files with canonical domain terms per CONTEXT.md glossary. Lesson: when an avoided term has a legitimate common-English use, review should classify it as Info rather than Warning.
